name: Harlan Table Lamp - 22.75 Inch Height - TBL4184 - Bronze - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the HARLAN table lamp, an elegant addition that brings both style and function to any room. Standing at 22.75 inches, this lamp features a striking bronze finish that complements a variety of decor styles, from modern to classic. Crafted from sturdy iron, it combines durability with a sleek, contemporary design. The lamp's sophisticated presence makes it a perfect choice for your living room, bedroom, or office, offering a warm and inviting glow. Its minimalist silhouette and tasteful color ensure it seamlessly fits into any setting. Transform your environment with the HARLAN table lamp, where form meets function in a versatile masterpiece.
